metadata.description: yukineko's Claude Code tools. Hosts propguard, a subscription-native property gate that formalizes semantic invariants from done_criteria.

plugins.name: propguard
plugins.description: Property gate: a Stop hook that derives 3–5 semantic properties from a task's done_criteria and checks the generated code against them before the agent finishes — inject a property checklist for the agent to self-verify, or run an independent checker and count per-property PASS/FAIL. Blocks when fewer than a threshold hold. Bundled Rust binary, runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.
